items.summary: Android Framework contains an integer overflow vulnerability that allows for code execution that could allow for local privilege escalation.

items.title: How Neo's Agent Architecture Evolved: From One Agent → Plan, Execute & Verify
items.summary: Our first engineering post covered prompt caching, the infrastructure change that made long-running agentic tasks economically viable. That post assumed a multi-step, multi-agent system already existed. It did not exist on day one. When we…

items.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
items.summary: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how…

items.title: Oracle WebLogic Server Unspecified Vulnerability
items.summary: Oracle WebLogic contains an unspecified vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker with network access via T3, IIOP to compromise Oracle WebLogic Server. Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in unauthorized ac…

items.title: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
items.summary: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows attackers to bypass security restrictions and establish an unauthorized VPN connection.

items.title: Nx Console Embedded Malicious Code Vulnerability
items.summary: Nx Console contains an embedded malicious code vulnerability that allowed a malicious version of Nx Console to be published. The compromised extension fetched an obfuscated payload that could harvested credentials from multiple sources on d…

items.title: TanStack Unspecified Vulnerability
items.summary: TanStack contains an unspecified vulnerability that allowed malicious versions of the product to be published to the npm registry to publish credential-stealing malware under a trusted identity.

items.title: Daemon Tools Lite Embedded Malicious Code Vulnerability
items.summary: Daemon Tools contains an unspecified vulnerability that has a high impact on confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

items.title: LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
items.summary: LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin contains privilege escalation vulnerability that is exposed via the user-end cPanel plugin, which can be abused by any cPanel user account to execute arbitrary scripts with root privileges.

items.title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
items.summary: Authorities in the Netherlands have arrested the co-owners of two related Internet hosting companies for operating IT infrastructure used by Russia to carry out cyberattacks, influence operations and disinformation campaigns inside the Euro…

items.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
items.summary: Lawmakers in both houses of Congress are demanding answers from the U.S. Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) after KrebsOnSecurity reported this week that a CISA contractor intentionally published AWS GovCloud keys an…

items.title: Drupal Core SQL Injection Vulnerability
items.summary: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.

items.title: Alleged Kimwolf Botmaster ‘Dort’ Arrested, Charged in U.S. and Canada
items.summary: Canadian authorities on Wednesday arrested a 23-year-old Ottawa man on suspicion of building and operating Kimwolf, a fast spreading Internet-of-Things botnet that enslaved millions of devices for use in a series of massive distributed deni…

items.title: Red-Teaming Cloud Infrastructure with Neo
items.summary: Most AI security tooling shipped over the last year focuses on one of two workflows, code review at PR time or zero-day research in open-source software. Models in PR pipelines now flag insecure patterns at every commit and autonomous resea…

items.title: Langflow Origin Validation Error Vulnerability
items.summary: Langflow contains an origin validation error vulnerability in which an overly permissive CORS configuration combined with a refresh token cookie configured as SameSite=None allows a malicious webpage to perform cross-origin requests that in…

items.title: Trend Micro Apex One (On-Premise) Directory Traversal Vulnerability
items.summary: Trend Micro Apex One (on-premise) contains a directory traversal vulnerability that could allow a pre-authenticated local attacker to modify a key table on the server to inject malicious code to deploy to agents on affected installations.

items.title: Microsoft Windows Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Windows contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the Windows Server Service that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted RPC request that triggers an overflow during path canonicalization.

items.title: Microsoft DirectX NULL Byte Overwrite Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft DirectX contains a NULL byte overwrite vulnerability in the QuickTime Movie Parser Filter in quartz.dll in DirectShow which could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted QuickTime media file.

items.title: Adobe Acrobat and Reader Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
items.summary: Adobe Acrobat and Reader contain a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability which could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted PDF file that triggers memory corruption.

items.title: Microsoft Internet Explorer Use-After-Free Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Internet Explorer contains an use-after-free vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code by accessing a pointer associated with a deleted object. The impacted product could be end-of-life (EoL) and/or…

items.title: Microsoft Internet Explorer Use-After-Free Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Internet Explorer contains an use-after-free vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via vectors involving access to an invalid pointer after the deletion of an object. The impacted product could…

items.title: Microsoft Defender Link Following Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Defender contains a link following vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

items.title: Microsoft Defender Denial of Service Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft Defender contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for denial of service.

items.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
items.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of…
